---
title: "Cities of Gresham, Beaverton, and Hillsboro, Oregon Annual Rate Review / Rate Setting"
subtitle: "2004-2025"
number: 32
image: /images/skagit-wa.jpg
image-alt: "Image of Skagit County, Washington"
categories: ["Transfer/MRF/Transport"]
---

::: {.article}
